name: Auckland International Airport Limited
analysis: AIA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.8650, stop A$6.6132, target A$7.6891 (3.27:1) — then trail it.
